verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Draw me from fear into faithfulness Lead me along your ways Draw me from sin into your holiness That I maybe a living praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Draw me deeper and deeper into your word of truth Deeper and deeper into my love for you Draw me deeper and deeper to the place you are Draw me deeper and deeper that I may know your heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Draw me from hate into charity From restlessness into your peace Draw me from anger Lord into gentleness Unto every storm in my life shall cease

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And like the moth into the flame Draw me into your light Unto the very air I breath is your resurrection life

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Draw me deeper and deeper into your word of truth Deeper and deeper into my love for you Draw me deeper and deeper to the place you are Draw me deeper and deeper that I may know your heart
